_meta.session: BMT batch 1 — Priority 3 SWE multilingual. Both benchmarks published April 2025, tested only pre-frontier models (Claude-3.5-Sonnet, GPT-4o, DeepSeek V3/R1). No 2026 frontier scores published on official repos or launch blogs. Metadata registered for future ingestion. Frontier coding evaluation in 2026 has consolidated on SWE-bench Verified/Pro/rebench/Multilingual.

benchmarks.name: Multi-SWE-bench
benchmarks.description: ByteDance Seed: 1,632 repo-level issues across 8 languages (Java, Go, TS, JS, Py, C++, Rust, C). Three scaffolds: MagentLess, MSWE-agent, OpenHands.

benchmarks.name: SWE-PolyBench
benchmarks.description: Amazon Science: 2,110 repo-level multi-language coding tasks (165 Java / 1,017 JS / 729 TS / 199 Py) with execution-based grading. Includes 382-instance Verified split.
